g.text: — click any card to view repo —
Sole developer. Bid validation, proxy bidding,
LangGraph travel planner. RAG over Postgres +
model routing with per-request cost logging.
LLM extracts features, Random Forest predicts
RAG vs plain LLM. Local LogReg vs zero-shot.
20K tickets. Recommends what to ship at
Java + Firebase Android app. Learning paths,
player debug battles. MVVM + Hilt + Room.
